blockers.blocker: Management API SSO/JIT endpoint response shapes not observed
Custom Token Script context not verified for upstream claims/groups
stable correlation tuple not confirmed from Logto objects
do not invent identity.* permissions; future permissions must be canonical and planned until complete evidence

external attributes/groups cannot become Data Scope directly

SCIM desired state authority and provenance not implemented
identity observed != membership active != seat allocated != role materialized != authorization allowed
directory fetch/reconciliation/materialization/deprovision/credential rotation need operation resources/outbox-inbox design
